\tzpentry{ID4470}{Pressure Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4470 introduces Pressure Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{P}_M = \frac{1}{3} \mathcal{M}^\mu_\mu \cdot \exp\left( \frac{\Phi_{\text{TZP}}}{P_T} \right) \cdot \chi_T \equiv P_{\text{vac}} \cdot \left[ 1 - \text{det}(J_p) \right]$$
